note: This is an unaffiliated demo built on Obsidian's own publicly published pricing page, for illustrative purposes only.

core_app.price: Free, no limits, no sign-up required
core_app.details: The core Obsidian app is free for personal AND commercial/work use. No feature restrictions.

sync.annual: $4 USD per user, per month, billed annually
sync.monthly: $5 USD per user, per month, billed monthly

publish.annual: $8 USD per site, per month, billed annually
publish.monthly: $10 USD per site, per month, billed monthly

commercial_license.details: NOT required. Voluntary/optional even for organizations using Obsidian for work. Obsidian's own FAQ explicitly states organizations are only 'encouraged', not required, to purchase this to support independent development.

policies.refund_policy: Full refunds within 7 days of purchase, no questions asked, for Sync and Publish only. Catalyst licenses, Commercial licenses, and Obsidian Credit are non-refundable.
policies.data_policy: Data is stored locally on-device by default and is not accessible to Obsidian. Sync data (if purchased) is secured with AES-256 end-to-end encryption; Obsidian does not collect telemetry or sell user data.
policies.discounts: 40% discount on Sync and Publish for verified students, faculty, and nonprofit employees. No other discounts or promotions offered.

common_misconception_flagged.why_flagged: Several third-party pricing summaries (not Obsidian's own site) claim a commercial license was 'required until Feb 2026 and then removed'. Obsidian's own FAQ contradicts this: it has never been a requirement, only a voluntary contribution. This is exactly the kind of stale/second-hand claim an AI answering from general knowledge is likely to repeat.
